basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website annauniv.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Project Assistant post through the Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E / M.Tech Textile Technology/ Polymer Science & Engineering/Biotechnology/Material Science/ Nanotechnology/Chemical Engineering, M.Sc in Chemistry / Physics / Material Science/Biochemistry
qualification.details: M.E / M.Tech Textile Technology/ Polymer Science & Engineering/Biotechnology/Material Science/ Nanotechnology/Chemical Engineering (OR) M.Sc in Chemistry / Physics / Material Science/Biochemistry

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Anna University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Anna University Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Anna University Project Assistant position is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authorities before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E / M.Tech in Textile Technology, Polymer Science & Engineering, Biotechnology, Material Science, Nanotechnology, or Chemical Engineering, or an M.Sc in Chemistry, Physics, Material Science, or Biochemistry.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q6. How should candidates apply for this position?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply offline. This involves downloading the application form, filling it correctly, attaching necessary documents, and sending it via Speed Post or Registered Post to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Assistant position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Anna University located?
faq.answer: Anna University is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600025.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation mentioned for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or age relaxation details for reserved categories.
